description: Fix GraphQL injection vulnerability in batch_update_issues where user-provided issue IDs are interpolated directly into the GraphQL query string via template literals.
qualityChecks: cd plugins/linear && npm run build && npm run type-check && npm run lint && npm run format:check

userStories.title: Use GraphQL variables for issue IDs in batch_update_issues
userStories.description: Replace string interpolation of issue IDs in the GraphQL query with proper GraphQL variables to prevent injection.
acceptanceCriteria: Issue IDs are passed as GraphQL variables, not interpolated into the query string with double quotes
No template literal interpolation of user-provided values appears in the GraphQL query body
The mutation still executes correctly for a batch of issue IDs with the same aliased pattern
